title: LMND Stock Analysis 2026: Morgan Stanley Upgrade, Tesla Partnership, And Path To Profitability
text: LMND stock analysis covering 2026 Morgan Stanley upgrade, Tesla partnership, and profitability path. Morgan Stanley upgraded rating from Equal-Weight to Overweight, raised price target from $80 to $85. Upgrade motivated by Tesla partnership giving Lemonade competitive edge in data analysis and operational experience in autonomous vehicle insurance. Firm projects significant expansion as automotive sector transitions to autonomous vehicles, amplifying business scale through Lemonade Car division. LMND analyst consensus shows Hold rating based on 10 Wall Street analysts. Average 12-month price target $64.14, high forecast $92.00, low forecast $33.00. Profitability timeline: company expects positive adjusted EBITDA Q4 2026, full-year profitability in 2027. Recent performance: Q1 2026 revenue $258M (up 71% YoY), in-force premium $1.33B (up 32%), customers 3.14M (up 23%). Analyst divide reflects growth vs. profitability debate: some bullish on Tesla opportunity and AI-driven underwriting, others concerned about execution risk and premium valuation.
